name: Harari Region (Ethiopia)

colors.symbolism: the field of the flag — peace
the heraldic colour of the regional emblem
the regional emblem and the surrounding agriculture

description: A white field charged centrally with the emblem of the Harari Region — depicting the historic walls and gates of the city of Harar.
history: The Harari Region is one of the smallest regional states of the Federal Democratic Republic of Ethiopia, comprising essentially the historic walled city of Harar Jugol. The regional flag was adopted with the establishment of the regional state under the 1995 Constitution.

features.symbolism: the historic walls and gates of Harar Jugol — the walled city that defines the region
